workspace.name: Welcome Home Africa
workspace.story: Welcome Home Africa gives abandoned babies in Uganda a place to heal, grow, and be loved through medical care, nutrition, and family-centered ministry.

projects.title: Baby Home Care
projects.description: Comprehensive residential care for abandoned infants.

projects.title: Medical Partnerships
projects.description: Collaborations with hospitals to ensure specialized care.

projects.title: Family Reintegration
projects.description: Preparing children and families for reunification or adoption.

recipients_category.name: Baby Home Residents
recipients_category.description: Babies currently living at Welcome Home Africa.

recipients.story: Evelyn is recovering from severe malnutrition and responding well to care at the home.

news.title: Story: From Crisis to Cuddles
news.excerpt: Baby Emmanuel's story reminds us why your support matters.
news.body: Our blog recently highlighted Emmanuel's journey from critical care to a thriving toddler surrounded by love.

pdfs.description: Information sheet for new partners and volunteers.
